recommendations.title: Good Luck Charlie, It's Christmas!
recommendations.overview: Teddy Duncan's middle-class family embarks on a road trip from their home in Denver to visit Mrs. Duncans Parents, the Blankenhoopers, in Palm Springs. When they find themselves stranded between Denver and Utah, they try to hitch a ride to Las Vegas

recommendations.title: Wild Tales
recommendations.overview: Injustice and the demands of the world can cause stress for many people. Some of them, however, explode. This includes a waitress serving a grouchy loan shark, an altercation between two motorists, an ill-fated wedding reception, and a wealthy busine

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part II
recommendations.overview: In the continuing saga of the Corleone crime family, a young Vito Corleone grows up in Sicily and in 1910s New York. In the 1950s, Michael Corleone attempts to expand the family business into Las Vegas, Hollywood and Cuba.

recommendations.title: Highway to Hell
recommendations.overview: Charlie and Rachel run away from home to get married in Las Vegas. But they get attacked by a zombie who takes Rachel with him to hell, where she will become one of Satan's brides.

recommendations.title: Black Moon Rising
recommendations.overview: An FBI free-lancer stashes a stolen Las Vegas-crime tape in a high-tech car stolen by someone else.

recommendations.title: What Happens in Vegas
recommendations.overview: During a wild vacation in Las Vegas, career woman Joy McNally and playboy Jack Fuller come to the sober realization that they have married each other after a night of drunken abandon. They are then compelled, for legal reasons, to live life as a coup

recommendations.title: Cabin Boy
recommendations.overview: A foul-mouthed finishing school graduate mistakenly winds up on an ill-fated fishing boat, and faces the wrath of a crew that considers him bad luck.

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eleven
recommendations.overview: Danny Ocean and his gang attempt to rob the five biggest casinos in Las Vegas in one night.

recommendations.title: The Hangover Part III
recommendations.overview: This time, there's no wedding. No bachelor party. What could go wrong, right? But when the Wolfpack hits the road, all bets are off.

recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.
